Project.title: Project
Project.description: A project that time entries can be associated with.

colorClass.description: The tailwind color class associated with the project.

createdAt.description: ISO string representing when the project was created.

uid.description: The user ID of the project owner.

Entry.title: Time Entry
Entry.description: A recorded time entry for a specific project.

projectId.description: The ID of the project this entry belongs to.

task.description: A description of the work done.

startTime.description: ISO string representing when the entry started.

endTime.description: ISO string representing when the entry ended. Null if still running.

durationSeconds.description: The duration of the entry in seconds.

uid.description: The user ID of the entry owner.

/users/{userId}/entries/{entryId}.description: Time entries owned by the user.
